headline: Comcast to Participate in MoffettNathanson Investor Conference
summary: PHILADELPHIA, April 30, 2026--Comcast Corporation (Nasdaq: CMCSA) announced that on Thursday, May 14, 2026, Steve Croney, CEO of Comcast’s Connectivity & Platforms segment, will participate in the MoffettNathanson Media, Internet and Communications Conference.

headline: Comcast and Boys & Girls Clubs of Thurston County Open Lift Zones in Lacey to Help Youth Build Digital Skills
summary: WASHINGTON, D.C. / ACCESS Newswire / April 30, 2026 / Comcast and Boys & Girls Clubs of Thurston County (BGCTC) have opened new Lift Zones in Lacey, Tumwater, Yelm, and Rochester to help youth build their digital skills. The Kaila Celeste Rants-Jorgensen ...
